scripts.clean: bun -e "import { rmSync } from 'fs'; for (const p of ['node_modules','bun.lock','bun.lockb']) { try { rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch {} }"
scripts.test:backend: bun test server/buildingStore.test.ts server/tileLootStore.test.ts server/playerStore.test.ts server/dbIntegrity.test.ts
scripts.test:backend:watch: bun test --watch server/buildingStore.test.ts server/tileLootStore.test.ts server/playerStore.test.ts server/dbIntegrity.test.ts
